The Practice

Module 1 — Claude for beginners

Your first real session: what Claude is, how to talk to it, and how to put it to work for your business that same day.

60 minutes · live, small group

What we'll cover

  • What Claude is, and how to talk to it
  • Prompts that get useful results for real work
  • Putting it to work on a task from your business that same day

What you'll walk out with

A workflow you'll actually keep using.

Know before you go

Nothing — start here.

See dates & book

Questions, answered

About this class

1

Who is Module 1 — Claude for beginners for?

Women founders who are just starting out — no prior experience assumed. It's part of The Practice, the hands-on AI track — no technical background needed.

2

Do I need any experience?

Nothing — start here.

3

What will I walk out with?

A workflow you'll actually keep using. Every Quinta & Co. class ends with something real you keep.

4

When can I take this class?

It's open now — 60 minutes · live, small group. Dates and booking are right on this page.
